description: Diff view between local work-items.yaml and ADO / JIRA state

# /alm status

> Show local vs ALM counts + per-item differences. No writes.

## Usage

```
/alm status [<artifact>] [--feature <f>] [--domain <d>] [--scope plan|suite|case] [--plan-id <id>] [--project <name>]
```

`<artifact>` defaults to `all` (work-items + tests). When specified: `work-items` | `tests` | `wiki`.

## Inputs

- `project.config.yaml alm.*`
- `projects/{p}/work-items.yaml`
- `projects/{p}/{agent}/features/{f}/traceability.yaml`
- ALM via MCP `alm_query`

## Execution flow

1. Resolve scope (feature / domain / artefact).
2. Query ALM for the in-scope items (`alm_query`).
3. Load local equivalent from `work-items.yaml` + `test-plan/`.
4. Compute diff:
   - Items in local not yet pushed → `needs-push`
   - Items in ALM not in local → `alm-only` (could be product-team work; classification depends on `--read-only-levels` config)
   - Items in both but content differs → fetch full ALM body + compute hash; compare against `pulledHash` in traceability
     - If `currentAlmHash == pulledHash` AND `local content hash == pushedHash` → in-sync (`OK`)
     - If `currentAlmHash != pulledHash` AND `local content hash == pushedHash` → ALM-edited-since-push (`alm-changed`)
     - If `currentAlmHash == pulledHash` AND `local content hash != pushedHash` → local-edited (`local-changed`)
     - Both differ → both-changed; conflict on next push (`conflict`)
5. Render console diff summary + write `projects/{p}/alm-reports/status-{ts}.md`.

## Output sample

```
Test plan: Case Management
  Local: 14 suites, 187 test cases
  ALM:   14 suites, 185 test cases
  Diff:  2 cases local-only (need push)
         0 cases ALM-only
         3 cases differ (local-edited; last pushed 2026-05-10)

Work items (CE / case-management):
  Local L1: 1 Epic
  Local L2: 3 Features
  Local L3: 12 Stories (12 in ALM; 0 differ)
  Local L4: 38 Tasks (35 in ALM; 3 needs-push; 0 conflicts)
```
